abstract: We consider a holographic Einstein-Maxwell model in five dimensions with pure gauge and mixed gauge-gravitational Chern-Simons terms to study anomaly-induced transport in the presence of explicit symmetry breaking. We include the full backreaction of the scalar field and gauge fields on the metric and compute the anomalous transport coefficients using Kubo formulae involving charge and energy current correlators. Our findings reveal that, in the presence of explicit symmetry breaking, anomaly-induced transport phenomena can extend beyond anomalous currents and affect the non-anomalous sector as well. The transport coefficients exhibit a clear dependence on the symmetry-breaking mass parameter, highlighting the interplay between quantum anomalies and explicit symmetry breaking in holographic systems.
summary: 我们考虑具有纯规范和混合规范引力陈-西蒙斯项的五维全息爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦模型，以研究在存在显式对称性破缺的情况下异常引起的输运。我们将标量场和规范场的完全反作用纳入度量，并使用涉及电荷和能量电流相关器的 Kubo 公式计算反常输运系数。我们的研究结果表明，在存在明显的对称性破缺的情况下，异常引起的输运现象可以扩展到异常电流之外，并影响非异常区域。传输系数表现出对对称破缺质量参数的明显依赖性，突出了全息系统中量子异常和显式对称破缺之间的相互作用。

title: The dynamical algebra of the generic superintegrable model on the two-sphere
abstract: The rank two Jacobi algebra $\mathfrak{J}_2$ is identified as the dynamical algebra of the generic quadratic superintegrable model on the two-sphere. The physical representation of this algebra is obtained from its embedding in $\mathfrak{su}(1,1)^{\otimes 3}$. The exact solution of the model is derived algebraically from this representation. The wavefunctions are found to be expressed in terms of two-variable Jacobi polynomials whose characterization is a by-product of the algebraic treatment of the model.
summary: 二阶雅可比代数 $\mathfrak{J}_2$ 被确定为二球体上通用二次超可积模型的动力学代数。该代数的物理表示是通过嵌入 $\mathfrak{su}(1,1)^{\otimes 3}$ 中获得的。模型的精确解是从该表示中以代数方式导出的。波函数被发现用二变量雅可比多项式表示，其特征是模型代数处理的副产品。

title: Rigged Liouville space formulation for quasi-Hermitian Liouville operators
abstract: We discuss a super bra-ket formalism for quasi-Hermitian Liouvillian operators within the framework of rigged Hilbert spaces (RHS). An RHS in terms of the Liouville space, referred to as a rigged Liouville space (RLS), is reconstructed by exploiting the mathematical fact that the space of Hilbert-Schmidt operators is unitarily equivalent to the tensor product of Hilbert spaces. The obtained RLS endows a rigorous foundation of the construction for the super bra-ket and for the spectral decompositions of both Hermitian and quasi-Hermitian Liouville operators, which are characterized by the generalized eigenvectors in the dual spaces. Furthermore, within this framework, the non-Hermitian Liouvillian operator and its adjoint can be constructed symmetrically, with their symmetric structure preserved. As an application of our RLS methodology, we examine the Liouville operators corresponding to Hermitian and non-Hermitian harmonic oscillators and elucidate the differences between their spectral decomposition forms.
summary: 我们在操纵希尔伯特空间（RHS）的框架内讨论了准厄米刘维算子的超级括号形式主义。刘维尔空间的 RHS，称为装备刘维尔空间 (RLS)，是通过利用希尔伯特-施密特算子的空间酉等价于希尔伯特空间的张量积这一数学事实来重建的。所获得的RLS为超括号以及厄米和准厄米刘维尔算子的谱分解的构造提供了严格的基础，其特征在于对偶空间中的广义特征向量。此外，在这个框架内，非厄米刘维尔算子及其伴随物可以对称构造，并保留其对称结构。作为 RLS 方法的应用，我们研究了与厄米和非厄米谐振子相对应的刘维尔算子，并阐明了它们谱分解形式之间的差异。

title: Combinatorics and asymptotic behavior for double Hurwitz numbers
abstract: Polynomial-in-time algorithms for computing classical Hurwitz numbers were given in [4] based on the Pandharipande equation. The paritition function of double Hurwitz numbers was proved [21] to satisfy the 2-Toda hierarchy. In this paper, similar to [21] we derive Pandharipande-type equations for double Hurwitz numbers from 2-Toda hierarchy. Based on these equations and a method from [4], we study large genus as well as large degree asymptotics of double Hurwitz numbers.
summary: [4] 基于 Pandharipande 方程给出了用于计算经典 Hurwitz 数的多项式时间算法。双Hurwitz数的奇偶函数被证明[21]满足2-Toda层次结构。在本文中，类似于[21]，我们从 2-Toda 层次推导出双 Hurwitz 数的 Pandharipande 型方程。基于这些方程和[4]中的方法，我们研究了双 Hurwitz 数的大亏格和大度渐近。

title: On enumeration of $b$-angulations of surfaces from an integrability perspective
abstract:
In this paper, we study generating series enumerating polygonal angulations of closed oriented surfaces of fixed genus, focusing on $b$-angulations with $b = 3$ or $b = 2
u$, $
u \geq 2$. Based on Toda integrability, we establish new structural results in the cases $b = 3$ and $b = 4$. Furthermore, via the Hodge--GUE correspondence, we derive a fine structure in the $b = 2
u$ case, which implies a conjectural statement of Gharakhloo--Latimer.
summary:
在本文中，我们研究生成枚举固定亏格的闭合定向表面的多边形角度的序列，重点关注 $b$ 角度，其中 $b = 3$ 或 $b = 2
u$、$
u \geq 2$。基于 Toda 可积性，我们在 $b = 3$ 和 $b = 4$ 的情况下建立了新的结构结果。此外，通过 Hodge--GUE 对应关系，我们在 $b = 2
u$ 情况下导出了一个精细结构，这意味着 Gharakhloo--Latimer 的猜想陈述。

title: A Complex-Valued Continuous-Variable Quantum Approximation Optimization Algorithm (CCV-QAOA)
abstract: Continuous-variable (CV) quantum systems offer a natural framework for continuous optimization through their infinite-dimensional Hilbert spaces. In this paper, we propose the Complex Continuous-Variable Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (CCV-QAOA), a variational framework operating in the complex domain that optimizes over complex decision variables. The method efficiently solves real and complex multivariate optimization problems. To demonstrate its versatility, we apply CCV-QAOA across a broad suite of optimization use cases, including convex quadratic minimization, scaling studies with circuit depth and cutoff dimension, constrained quadratic programs using penalty constructions, and non-convex benchmarks such as the Styblinski-Tang function and complex quartic landscapes.
summary: 连续变量 (CV) 量子系统通过其无限维希尔伯特空间提供了连续优化的自然框架。在本文中，我们提出了复杂连续变量量子近似优化算法（CCV-QAOA），这是一种在复杂域中运行的变分框架，可对复杂决策变量进行优化。该方法有效地解决了真实且复杂的多元优化问题。为了证明其多功能性，我们将 CCV-QAOA 应用于一系列广泛的优化用例，包括凸二次最小化、电路深度和截止维度的缩放研究、使用惩罚结构的约束二次程序以及非凸基准，例如 Styblinski-Tang 函数和复杂的四次景观。

title: Coherent Rollout Oracles for Finite-Horizon Sequential Decision Problems
abstract: Coherent quantum rollout for sequential decision problems requires a unitary simulator: randomness must live in explicit quantum registers, and basis-state selectors must be mapped to actions reversibly. With branch-dependent valid actions, this mapping is totalized coherent rank-select over an entangled $N$-bit validity mask: return the position of the $r$-th valid bit, or a sentinel if $r$ is out of range. We give the first reversible-circuit complexity analysis of this primitive. For selector width $w = \lceil \log_2(N+1) \rceil$, rank-select admits an $O(Nw)$-gate low-ancilla bounded-span scan, proved gate-optimal in its model, and an $O(N\log w)$-gate low-ancilla blocked construction when long-range gates are available; across all bounded-fan-in layouts, the unconditional gate lower bound is $\Omega(N)$. Composing rank-select with reversible transition and predicate-evaluation circuits gives an explicit polynomial-size coherent rollout oracle for finite-horizon planning problems satisfying these primitive assumptions. The resulting oracle satisfies the access model of the best-arm pipeline of Wang et al., yielding $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k}/\varepsilon)$ coherent oracle calls against the standard classical $\Omega(k/\varepsilon^2)$ arm-pull lower bound. We give a bounded-influence lifting theorem that extends this lower-bound construction from a base configuration to an exponential family of configurations. We instantiate the construction on SIR epidemic intervention, with a stochastic placement-game sanity check, and machine-check the main results in Lean 4. Code and proofs: this https URL .
summary:
顺序决策问题的相干量子推出需要单一模拟器：随机性必须存在于显式量子寄存器中，并且基础状态选择器必须可逆地映射到动作。对于依赖于分支的有效操作，此映射是在纠缠的 $N$ 位有效性掩码上汇总一致的排名选择：返回第 $r$ 个有效位的位置，如果 $r$ 超出范围，则返回标记。我们对该原语进行了首次可逆电路复杂性分析。对于选择器宽度 $w = \lceil \log_2(N+1) \rceil$，等级选择允许 $O(Nw)$-gate 低辅助有界跨度扫描，在其模型中证明是门最优，并且当远程门可用时，允许 $O(N\log w)$-gate 低辅助阻塞构造；在所有有界扇入布局中，无条件门下限为 $\Omega(N)$。将排序选择与可逆转换和谓词评估电路组合起来，为满足这些原始假设的有限范围规划问题提供了一个显式的多项式大小的一致推出预言。

由此产生的预言机满足 Wang 等人的最佳臂管道的访问模型，产生 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k}/\varepsilon)$ 与标准经典 $\Omega(k/\varepsilon^2)$ 手臂拉动下限相一致的预言机调用。我们给出了一个有限影响提升定理，将这种下界构造从基本配置扩展到指数配置族。我们实例化了 SIR 流行病干预的构建，通过随机放置游戏健全性检查，并机器检查精益 4 中的主要结果。代码和证明：此 https URL 。

title: A Lie-algebraic Criterion for the Universality of Exponentiated Quantum Gates
abstract: We present a criterion that serves as the basis for a polynomial-time algorithm to decide whether a finite set of qudit gates exponentiated by some Hamiltonians is universal. Our approach formulates universality in Lie algebraic terms and applies Borel--de Siebenthal theory with a diagonal generator having incommensurate spectrum. In this framework, nonuniversality is detected by invariant subspaces, equivalently by a graph-connectivity obstruction, while universality is repaired by adding generators that couple disconnected components. We further prove that two generators are sufficient for universal control. Our work reveals a profound link between qudit universality and irreducibility of Lie algebra representations.
summary: 我们提出了一个标准，作为多项式时间算法的基础来决定由一些哈密顿量求幂的有限 qudit 门集是否具有通用性。我们的方法用李代数项表述了普适性，并应用 Borel-de Siebenthal 理论和具有不通约谱的对角线生成器。在这个框架中，非通用性是通过不变子空间（相当于图连接障碍）来检测的，而通用性是通过添加耦合断开组件的生成器来修复的。我们进一步证明两个发电机足以进行通用控制。我们的工作揭示了李代数表示的量子普遍性和不可约性之间的深刻联系。

title: No Tile Left Behind: Multiprogramming for Surface-Code Architectures
abstract: Fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) is emerging as the architectural regime in which practical large-scale quantum workloads will execute. In this setting, however, multiprogramming is no longer a matter of partitioning a flat pool of qubits. Quantum error correction exposes a structured floorplan of data tiles, ancilla tiles, and magic-state service resources, so concurrent execution must account for compact placement, connectivity, routing headroom, and shared support infrastructure. This makes FTQC multiprogramming fundamentally harder than its NISQ counterpart: admission decisions can fragment the remaining floorplan, conservative reservations can waste ancilla, and dynamic contention across data, ancilla, and magic-state resources can degrade both throughput and quality of service. In this work, we develop a formal framework for FTQC multiprogramming that captures these structural constraints and their runtime implications. We formulate the baseline static allocation problem, extend it to limited-resource and online settings through hierarchy-aware scheduling policies, and further generalize it to cultivation-enabled architectures with dynamic magic-state generation. Through simulation on synthetic Clifford+T workloads, the proposed scheduler achieves a normalized system speedup of 3.1x, improving over prior FTQC multiprogramming baselines by ~29% while maintaining low mean slowdown.
summary:
容错量子计算（FTQC）正在成为执行实际大规模量子工作负载的架构体系。然而，在这种情况下，多道程序设计不再是划分量子位平面池的问题。量子纠错公开了数据块、辅助块和魔法状态服务资源的结构化布局规划，因此并发执行必须考虑紧凑的布局、连接、路由余量和共享支持基础设施。这使得 FTQC 多道编程从根本上比其 NISQ 对应物更难：准入决策可能会使剩余的布局规划变得支离破碎，保守的保留可能会浪费辅助资源，而数据、辅助资源和魔法状态资源之间的动态争用可能会降低吞吐量和服务质量。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个 FTQC 多道编程的正式框架，该框架捕获了这些结构约束及其运行时影响。我们制定了基线静态分配问题，通过层次结构感知的调度策略将其扩展到有限资源和在线设置，并进一步将其推广到具有动态魔法状态生成的可培养架构。

通过对合成 Clifford+T 工作负载的模拟，所提出的调度程序实现了 3.1 倍的标准化系统加速，比之前的 FTQC 多道编程基线提高了约 29%，同时保持了较低的平均减速。

title: Characterization of Thermalization Behaviour in a Generalized Aubry-André Model
abstract: Although random matrix theory provides a fundamental framework for characterizing quantum chaos, encompassing both ergodic and localized phases, a comprehensive understanding of the universal features governing the critical transition remains elusive in many disordered and quasi-random systems. In this study, we explore the ergodic-to-many-body localization transition in the generalized Aubry-André model with interacting spinless fermions. Using the concept of Frobenius norm of an adiabatic gauge potential, we construct a phase diagram that captures the sensitivity of the eigenspectrum to infinitesimal adiabatic gauge deformations. To examine the stability of the critical disordered strength with respect to system size, we perform an unbiased finite-size scaling analysis via cost-function minimization techniques. Additionally, by analyzing the adjacent gap ratio and spectral form factor, we determine the scaling behavior of the Thouless time as a function of the disorder strength.
summary: 尽管随机矩阵理论提供了表征量子混沌的基本框架，包括遍历阶段和局域阶段，但在许多无序和准随机系统中，对控制临界转变的普遍特征的全面理解仍然难以实现。在这项研究中，我们探索了具有相互作用的无自旋费米子的广义 Aubry-André 模型中的遍历到多体定位转变。利用绝热规范势的弗罗贝尼乌斯范数的概念，我们构建了一个相图，该相图捕获了特征谱对无穷小的绝热规范变形的敏感性。为了检查临界无序强度相对于系统尺寸的稳定性，我们通过成本函数最小化技术执行无偏有限尺寸缩放分析。此外，通过分析相邻间隙比和光谱形状因子，我们确定了 Thouless 时间的缩放行为作为无序强度的函数。

title: High-fidelity entangling gates and nonlocal circuits with neutral atoms
abstract: Creation and manipulation of entanglement with low error is essential in quantum information systems. In practice, two-qubit entangling gates constitute a dominant error source, limiting circuit depths and performance in fault-tolerant architectures. Using a neutral-atom quantum processor, we realize entangling CZ gates with a high Rabi frequency smooth-amplitude pulse, employing state-selective readout and qubit reuse for fast calibration, and achieve state-of-the-art fidelities of 99.854(4)% which improve to 99.941(3)% upon loss postselection, with stable performance for 10 hours. We then use these low-error gates in quantum circuits with coherent atom rearrangement. We first benchmark performance by creating and disentangling cluster states, and subsequently implement scrambling circuits featuring longer-range connectivity to study non-locally entangled states generated through chaotic dynamics. These results pave the way towards deep-circuit, efficient fault-tolerant quantum computation.
summary: 在量子信息系统中，以低误差创建和操纵纠缠至关重要。 In practice, two-qubit entangling gates constitute a dominant error source, limiting circuit depths and performance in fault-tolerant architectures. Using a neutral-atom quantum processor, we realize entangling CZ gates with a high Rabi frequency smooth-amplitude pulse, employing state-selective readout and qubit reuse for fast calibration, and achieve state-of-the-art fidelities of 99.854(4)% which improve to 99.941(3)% upon loss postselection, with stable performance for 10 hours.然后，我们在具有相干原子重排的量子电路中使用这些低误差门。 We first benchmark performance by creating and disentangling cluster states, and subsequently implement scrambling circuits featuring longer-range connectivity to study non-locally entangled states generated through chaotic dynamics.这些结果为深电路、高效容错量子计算铺平了道路。

title: Continuous Noise Model for Quantum Circuits
abstract: Quantum noise is a central challenge in quantum computing across many applications. Extensive work has examined how qubits couple to their environment, leading to decoherence and relaxation, which is irreversible. Current studies focus on coherent gate errors caused by control misalignment, which accumulate with circuit depth but can, in principle, be corrected. This work studies a continuous coherent noise model for quantum circuits and compares it with a discrete Pauli model. The focus is on small coherent gate errors that build up across circuit depth. These errors are modeled as random rotations on the Bloch sphere using a von Mises-Fisher distribution. In the small-angle limit, the model reduces to an isotropic Gaussian distribution. We test the model on quantum error-correction circuits based on the [[5,1,3]] and [[7,1,3]] codes. A variant of Grover's search circuit with different qubit counts is also examined. To enable fair comparison, we introduce a model-independent matching scheme. Pauli and continuous noise channels are aligned using the binary entropy at readout. This isolates the effect of noise structure at fixed uncertainty. An approximate analytical method for coherent error propagation is also developed. The method tracks error distributions through Clifford circuits without full Monte Carlo sampling. It reduces simulation cost while preserving accuracy for circuit-level error estimates. The approximation is validated against brute-force simulations, identifying its regime of validity with Clifford circuits and limits under error correction. Our results show that continuous coherent noise can degrade logical performance more strongly than Pauli noise. They also clarify when simplified propagation models succeed and when they break down.
summary:
量子噪声是许多应用中量子计算的一个核心挑战。大量的工作研究了量子位如何与其环境耦合，从而导致不可逆的退相干和松弛。 Current studies focus on coherent gate errors caused by control misalignment, which accumulate with circuit depth but can, in principle, be corrected.这项工作研究了量子电路的连续相干噪声模型，并将其与离散泡利模型进行了比较。重点是在电路深度上累积的小相干门误差。使用 von Mises-Fisher 分布将这些误差建模为布洛赫球面上的随机旋转。在小角度限制下，模型简化为各向同性高斯分布。我们在基于 [[5,1,3]] 和 [[7,1,3]] 代码的量子纠错电路上测试模型。还检查了具有不同量子位计数的格罗弗搜索电路的变体。为了实现公平比较，我们引入了一种与模型无关的匹配方案。泡利通道和连续噪声通道在读出时使用二元熵进行对齐。这隔离了固定不确定性下噪声结构的影响。

还开发了相干误差传播的近似分析方法。该方法通过 Clifford 电路跟踪误差分布，无需完全蒙特卡罗采样。它降低了仿真成本，同时保持了电路级误差估计的准确性。 The approximation is validated against brute-force simulations, identifying its regime of validity with Clifford circuits and limits under error correction.我们的结果表明，连续相干噪声比泡利噪声更能严重降低逻辑性能。他们还阐明了简化的传播模型何时成功以及何时失败。

title: QAOA Parameter Transfer for Hypergraphs
abstract: Variational Quantum Algorithms, including the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), have shown promise in solving optimization problems but rely on costly variational loops that can themselves be hard optimization problems. Many methods have been proposed to mitigate this variational cost, with one of the most common being parameter transfer and concentration where variational parameters for one problem instance or for an average over problem instances can be used as a good set of parameters for another instance. Methods exist for reweighting these parameters based off graph degree and edge weights, but there has been little work on how to do this reweighting to handle higher locality problems where the graph structure turns into a hypergraph structure. In this paper, we analytically derive parameter reweighting rules to transfer parameters between different locality hypergraphs, resulting in a reweighting for the mixing terms in the Hamiltonian which have previously not been considered. These analytics rely on three cycle-free and low-circuit-depth assumptions, but numerics indicate that the results can be used even when these assumptions are not satisfied. The numerics obtain high quality results across a diverse set of hypergraphs with locality less than or equal to five, improving on previous relations that do not reweight the mixing terms.

title: Iterative warm-start optimization with quantum imaginary time evolution
abstract: Approximate combinatorial optimization is a promising use case for quantum computers. The quantum optimization algorithms often employ a fixed ansatz that evolves an unbiased initial state towards states with better values of the optimand, then samples the states to determine an approximately optimal solution. However, promising alternative approaches have considered ``warm-start" and sampling-based methods that instead begin from the best known solution, which can be directly optimized with the quantum computer and updated as new information becomes available, potentially outperforming the fixed ansätze. Here we use these ideas to design a nonvariational quantum algorithm for combinatorial optimization. At each step the algorithm begins with a state superposed around the best known solution, then drives it to lower energy using quantum imaginary time evolution. These nonvariational, initial-state-dependent circuits are determined using analytic equations that are evaluated using only a conventional computer. After implementing the circuits, the state is sampled, potentially obtaining a new best-known solution to use as the initial state at the next iteration. Using simulations of the algorithm solving MaxCut on 3-regular graphs with 30 or fewer vertices and a shot budget of 100 total shots, the approach obtains median solutions within 95\% of the global optimum and finds optimal solutions in 11\% or more of cases, significantly outperforming random and simplified classical search procedures. We discuss several future directions.
summary:

However, promising alternative approaches have considered ``warm-start" and sampling-based methods that instead begin from the best known solution, which can be directly optimized with the quantum computer and updated as new information becomes available, potentially outperforming the fixed ansätze. Here we use these ideas to design a nonvariational quantum algorithm for combinatorial optimization. At each step the algorithm begins with a state superposed around the best known solution, then drives it to lower energy using quantum imaginary time evolution. These nonvariational, initial-state-dependent circuits are determined using analytic equations that are evaluated using only a conventional computer. After implementing the circuits, the state is sampled, potentially obtaining a new best-known solution to use as the initial state at the next iteration.

Using simulations of the algorithm solving MaxCut on 3-regular graphs with 30 or fewer vertices and a shot budget of 100 total shots, the approach obtains median solutions within 95\% of the global optimum and finds optimal solutions in 11\% or more of cases, significantly outperforming random and simplified classical search procedures.我们讨论了几个未来的方向。

title: Mathematical Foundation for Quantum Computing of Electromagnetic Wave Propagation in Dielectric Media
abstract: Can quantum computers effectively simulate the propagation and scattering of electromagnetic waves in a classical plasma? This chapter introduces some of the basic concepts in mathematics and physics essential to answering that question. The numerical simulations of Maxwell equations for wave propagation in dielectrics are constrained by technological limitations of the present-day computers. In contrast, there has been ample fanfare around quantum computers and their potential to far exceed the performance of traditional computers. Whether the enhanced capabilities of a quantum computer can be put to use for simulating topics in classical physics is a source of intrigue and curiosity.
summary: 量子计算机能否有效模拟电磁波在经典等离子体中的传播和散射？本章介绍了回答该问题所必需的一些数学和物理基本概念。 The numerical simulations of Maxwell equations for wave propagation in dielectrics are constrained by technological limitations of the present-day computers.相比之下，人们对量子计算机及其远远超过传统计算机性能的潜力进行了广泛宣传。 Whether the enhanced capabilities of a quantum computer can be put to use for simulating topics in classical physics is a source of intrigue and curiosity.

title: One knob to tune them all: Phase-controlled photon statistics and linewidth in partially pumped atomic ensembles
abstract: We study a minimal model of collective light emission from an incoherently driven ensemble of atoms where incoherent drive is applied only to a part of atoms and show that both the linewidth and the photon statistics can be controlled within a single framework. In this setting, collective dissipation induces correlations between the pumped and unpumped parts of the system, leading to interference between their emission contributions. By introducing a relative phase between these contributions and tuning the pump rate, we demonstrate that the properties of the emitted light can be varied over a broad range. In particular, the linewidth can be made either independent of system size or scale extensively with it, while the photon statistics can be tuned from antibunched or quantum to bunched. We further show that the role of the relative phase in controlling the interference can alternatively be played by the coherent interaction. By tuning the interaction strength together with the pump rate, one can access the same regimes as in the dissipation-only model. In addition, coherent interactions stabilize regimes of coherent emission with narrow linewidth, reminiscent of superradiant lasing. Our results illustrate how interference in partially driven collective systems provides a flexible mechanism for tailoring both spectral and statistical properties of light.
summary:
We study a minimal model of collective light emission from an incoherently driven ensemble of atoms where incoherent drive is applied only to a part of atoms and show that both the linewidth and the photon statistics can be controlled within a single framework. In this setting, collective dissipation induces correlations between the pumped and unpumped parts of the system, leading to interference between their emission contributions.通过在这些贡献之间引入相对相位并调整泵浦速率，我们证明发射光的特性可以在很宽的范围内变化。 In particular, the linewidth can be made either independent of system size or scale extensively with it, while the photon statistics can be tuned from antibunched or quantum to bunched. We further show that the role of the relative phase in controlling the interference can alternatively be played by the coherent interaction. By tuning the interaction strength together with the pump rate, one can access the same regimes as in the dissipation-only model.

In addition, coherent interactions stabilize regimes of coherent emission with narrow linewidth, reminiscent of superradiant lasing.我们的结果说明了部分驱动的集体系统中的干扰如何提供灵活的机制来定制光的光谱和统计特性。

title: Typical entanglement entropy with charge conservation
abstract: We consider a many-body Hilbert space with a fixed global charge and show that the typical entanglement entropy of a subsystem, at the leading and subleading order in the thermodynamic limit, can be expressed in terms of a single quantity which represents the local thermal entropy at fixed charge density. We find a general formula which applies both to abelian U(1) symmetry and non-abelian SU(2) symmetry, including the case of a local Hilbert space which transforms under a general reducible representation of the symmetry group. We illustrate the general formula with model systems and discuss the relevance of the results as a probe of quantum chaos for physical Hamiltonians.
summary: 我们考虑具有固定全局电荷的多体希尔伯特空间，并表明，在热力学极限的前导和次导序上，子系统的典型纠缠熵可以用表示固定电荷密度下的局部热熵的单个量来表示。我们找到了一个适用于交换 U(1) 对称和非交换 SU(2) 对称的通用公式，包括在对称群的一般可约表示下进行变换的局部希尔伯特空间的情况。我们用模型系统说明了通式，并讨论了结果作为物理哈密顿量的量子混沌探针的相关性。

title: Minimal action shortcut to adiabaticity in a driven Kitaev chain: competing gaps in a topological transition at finite-time
abstract: One of the main difficulties in preparing many-body ground states is achieving the target state through simple counterdiabatic controls. For critical systems crossing a transition to a topological phase, this task becomes even more challenging due to the closing of the gaps in multiple symmetry sectors. This is the case of the Kitaev chain, whose transition between the trivial and topological phases involves states belonging to different symmetry sectors. In this work, we apply the recently introduced minimal action shortcut to adiabaticity (MA-STA) to a Kitaev chain and propose a multi-step strategy to obtain the optimal control protocol to drive the system across its different phases. Our results show that high fidelities can be achieved through the adapted MA-STA at time scales much shorter than those of linear ramp protocols. We also compare the performance of both controls in suppressing work fluctuations. These findings may guide the design of STA protocols in many-body systems where competing energy scales and symmetries shape the global dynamics.
summary: 准备多体基态的主要困难之一是通过简单的反迪亚控制来实现目标状态。对于跨越过渡到拓扑阶段的关键系统，由于多个对称扇区中间隙的闭合，这项任务变得更具挑战性。基塔耶夫链就是这种情况，其平凡相和拓扑相之间的过渡涉及属于不同对称扇区的状态。在这项工作中，我们将最近引入的绝热最小动作捷径（MA-STA）应用于 Kitaev 链，并提出一种多步骤策略来获得最优控制协议来驱动系统跨不同阶段。我们的结果表明，通过调整后的 MA-STA 可以在比线性斜坡协议短得多的时间尺度上实现高保真度。我们还比较了两种控制在抑制工作波动方面的性能。这些发现可能会指导多体系统中 STA 协议的设计，其中竞争的能量尺度和对称性塑造了全局动态。

title: Algebraic quantum kinematics and SR-selection
abstract: We develop, as the first of a six-paper series, an operator-algebraic framework relating non-relativistic quantum mechanics and special relativity. Three structural facts organize the framework. (i)~The photon sector of free QED is a transparent realization: classical Fourier--Maxwell theory supplies a complex Hilbert-space scaffold (inner product, symplectic form, Schrödinger-form mode equation, polarization $\mathbb{C}^2$) with no quantum input, and a single canonical commutator with scale $\hbar$ on the mode amplitudes promotes it to single-photon QED, with photon indivisibility, the Planck relation $E=\hbar\omega$, and the spin spectrum $\pm\hbar$ as theorems. (ii)~The constants $c$ and $\hbar$ play non-interchangeable roles: $c$ is intrinsic to each Fourier-conjugate space, while $\hbar$ acts \emph{between} them, converting kinematic phase rates into dynamical observables. (iii)~Lifting the framework to a Haag--Kastler net with sharper-than-equal-time microcausality and positive-energy spectrum is structurally obstructed in the Galilean case; we state this as the SR-selection conjecture and identify three strands of evidence (Hegerfeldt spreading; absence of a known Galilean multi-particle resolution; Reeh--Schlieder failure on Galilean Haag--Kastler nets), the third established as a precise no-go theorem in the second paper of the series. The framework's modular content (Tomita--Takesaki, Bisognano--Wichmann, Unruh as KMS, type-$\mathrm{III}_1$ universality) is collected as the algebraic substrate on which the curved-background, dynamical-metric, and crossed-product extensions of the third through sixth papers operate.
summary:
作为六篇论文系列中的第一篇，我们开发了一个与非相对论量子力学和狭义相对论相关的算子代数框架。三个结构事实组织了这个框架。 (i)~自由QED的光子扇区是一个透明的实现：经典傅里叶-麦克斯韦理论提供了一个复杂的希尔伯特空间支架（内积、辛形式、薛定谔形式模式方程、偏振$\mathbb{C}^2$），没有量子输入，并且模式振幅上具有尺度$\hbar$的单个正则换向器将其提升为单光子QED，具有光子不可分割性，普朗克关系$E=\hbar\omega$ 和自旋谱 $\pm\hbar$ 作为定理。 (ii)~常数 $c$ 和 $\hbar$ 扮演着不可互换的角色：$c$ 是每个傅里叶共轭空间固有的，而 $\hbar$ 则在它们之间发挥作用，将运动相速率转换为动态可观测量。

(iii)~在伽利略案例中，将框架提升到具有比同等时间更清晰的微因果关系和正能量谱的哈格-卡斯特勒网在结构上受到阻碍；我们将其表述为 SR 选择猜想，并确定了三组证据（Hegerfeldt 扩展；缺乏已知的伽利略多粒子分辨率；Reeh--伽利略 Haag-Kastler 网上的 Schlieder 失败），第三组证据在该系列的第二篇论文中被确立为精确的不可行定理。该框架的模块化内容（Tomita--Takesaki、Bisognano--Wichmann、Unruh as KMS、type-$\mathrm{III}_1$ 通用性）被收集为代数基底，第三到第六篇论文的弯曲背景、动态度量和交叉积扩展在此运行。

title: Galilean Reeh--Schlieder Obstruction
abstract: We prove that the standard Galilean Haag--Kastler axioms, augmented by Bargmann mass superselection, are inconsistent with the Reeh--Schlieder property: no such net admits a vacuum that is cyclic and separating for every local field algebra. Two ingredients combine: Galilean Schrödinger fields annihilate the Fock vacuum, and Bargmann mass superselection forbids the Hermitian-combination evasion that keeps relativistic axioms consistent. The result extends beyond the Fock-representation hypothesis: any Galilean Haag--Kastler net whose canonical fields carry definite Bargmann mass charges and admit time-zero restrictions on a field-algebra-stable common dense domain is incompatible with Reeh--Schlieder. The bounded-below mass spectrum and the vacuum-at-spectral-minimum, usually imposed as separate axioms, are derived consequences -- of positive-energy boost positivity and a Bose-CCR algebraic descent, respectively. The Tomita--Takesaki modular flow is consequently unavailable on Galilean local field algebras. We identify the Reeh--Schlieder property as the precise structural ingredient distinguishing relativistic from Galilean algebraic quantum field theory: relativistic AQFT has it as a theorem, Galilean AQFT cannot.
summary:
我们证明标准伽利略 Haag-Kastler 公理，通过 Bargmann 质量超选择增强，与 Reeh-Schlieder 性质不一致：没有这样的网络允许一个对于每个局部场代数都是循环且分离的真空。两种成分结合在一起：伽利略薛定谔场消灭了福克真空，而巴格曼质量超选择禁止厄米特组合规避，从而保持相对论公理的一致性。结果超出了福克表示假设：任何伽利略 Haag-Kastler 网络，其规范场带有确定的 Bargmann 质量电荷，并承认对场代数稳定的公共稠密域的零时限制，与 Reeh-Schlieder 不兼容。通常作为单独的公理强加的下界质谱和光谱最小值真空分别是正能量增强正性和 Bose-CCR 代数下降的推导结果。因此，Tomita-Takesaki 模流在伽利略局部域代数上不可用。

我们将 Reeh--Schlieder 性质确定为区分相对论与伽利略代数量子场论的精确结构要素：相对论 AQFT 将其作为定理，而伽利略 AQFT 则不能。

title: Newton-Cartan limit of Klein-Gordon AQFT and the collapse of Galilean modular structure
abstract: We extend the established Galilean/relativistic structural divider in algebraic quantum field theory, namely, the absence of Reeh-Schlieder and of Tomita-Takesaki modular flow on local algebras of any Galilean Haag-Kastler net satisfying a natural axiom set augmented by the Bargmann-charge hypotheses (G7$^*$)(a) and (G7$^*$)(d) to curved backgrounds via the Newton-Cartan ($c\to\infty$) limit. We show, for the free Klein-Gordon field on Minkowski and on static globally hyperbolic spacetimes admitting a Post-Newtonian expansion, that a position-independent rest-energy rescaling produces in the limit a Galilean Haag-Kastler net satisfying the axioms of Ref. [1] in flat-space form (Minkowski) or in a curved-space modification (Killing-flow invariance and uniqueness of the vacuum replacing full translation invariance) appropriate to the static case. The Bargmann central charge equals the Klein--Gordon mass~$m$; the gravitational potential $V(x)$ enters the limiting Schrödinger Hamiltonian but not the algebraic structure obstructed by the Galilean Reeh-Schlieder no-go theorem. The strengthened obstruction theorem of Ref. [1] extends to the modified curved-space setting on Fock representations, and the limiting net carries no modular flow on local algebras. Schwarzschild is treated as a worked example: the Killing horizon shrinks to a point, the Hartle-Hawking thermal state has no $c\to\infty$ limit, and the Boulware vacuum limits to the gravitational hydrogenic ground state. The Reissner-Nordström metric is included as a sanity check confirming that leading Post-Newtonian misses the electromagnetic content of the background. We discuss how Newton's constant~$G$ enters the present (background-metric) framework only at the level of the limiting Hamiltonian, and indicate where dynamical-metric extensions would require $G$ to play a structural role.
summary:
我们将代数量子场论中已建立的伽利略/相对论结构分频器，即满足由巴格曼电荷假设 (G7$^*$)(a) 和 (G7$^*$)(d) 增强的自然公理集的任何伽利略 Haag-Kastler 网的局部代数上不存在 Reeh-Schlieder 和 Tomita-Takesaki 模流，通过牛顿嘉当扩展到弯曲背景($c\to\infty$) 限制。我们证明，对于 Minkowski 上的自由 Klein-Gordon 场和承认后牛顿展开的静态全局双曲时空，位置无关的静止能量重新缩放在极限内产生满足参考文献 1 的公理的伽利略 Haag-Kastler 网络。 [1] 适合静态情况的平坦空间形式（Minkowski）或弯曲空间修改（杀流不变性和真空的唯一性取代完全平移不变性）。巴格曼中心电荷等于克莱因-戈登质量~$m$；引力势 $V(x)$ 进入极限薛定谔哈密顿量，但不进入受伽利略 Reeh-Schlieder 不可行定理阻碍的代数结构。参考文献的强化阻碍定理。

[1] 扩展到 Fock 表示上的修改弯曲空间设置，并且极限网不承载局部代数上的模流。史瓦西被视为一个可行的例子：杀伤视界缩小到一个点，哈特尔-霍金热态没有 $c\to\infty$ 限制，而布尔韦尔真空限制为引力氢基态。 Reissner-Nordström 度量包含在内，作为健全性检查，确认领先的后牛顿度量忽略了背景的电磁内容。我们讨论牛顿常数~$G$ 如何仅在极限哈密顿量的水平上进入当前（背景度量）框架，并指出动态度量扩展在何处需要 $G$ 发挥结构作用。

title: Amplitude Encoding of Slater-Type Orbitals via Matrix Product States: Efficient State Preparation and Integral Evaluation on Quantum Hardware
abstract: Slater-type orbitals (STOs) provide the physically correct description of atomic wavefunctions but have been largely replaced by Gaussian-type orbitals in computational chemistry due to the lack of closed-form multi-center integrals. We present a systematic study of amplitude encoding of STOs on quantum computers using matrix product states (MPS). For one-dimensional orbital functions of the form $p_d(x) e^{-\zeta x}$, we derive analytical MPS constructions with constant bond dimension $\chi = d + 1$, requiring $O(n)$ classical and quantum resources for $n$-qubit registers with no grid sampling. We demonstrate a complete one-electron integral pipeline -- overlap, kinetic energy, and nuclear attraction -- in one dimension, validating the overlap and kinetic energy on IBM Heron processors at 5~qubits with 0.67\% hardware-induced error using Zero-Noise Extrapolation. In three dimensions, we compute multi-center overlap integrals between 1s and 2s orbitals in Cartesian coordinates with 0.02\% discretization error at 18~qubits. A systematic entanglement analysis reveals that the MPS bond dimension of three-dimensional STOs in Cartesian coordinates saturates with increasing grid resolution -- reaching $\sim$138 for the hydrogen 1s orbital at 12~qubits per coordinate -- establishing bounded encoding complexity rather than the exponential scaling initially expected. The SVD truncation threshold provides a practical resource parameter, reducing the bond dimension to 39 at threshold $10^{-6}$ with negligible accuracy loss. These results map the entanglement landscape for amplitude encoding of atomic orbitals and establish MPS-based state preparation as a viable path toward exact STO basis sets on quantum computers.
summary:
斯莱特型轨道（STO）提供了原子波函数的物理正确描述，但由于缺乏封闭形式的多中心积分，在计算化学中已被高斯型轨道所取代。我们使用矩阵乘积态 (MPS) 系统地研究了量子计算机上 STO 的幅度编码。对于 $p_d(x) e^{-\zeta x}$ 形式的一维轨道函数，我们推导出具有恒定键维 $\chi = d + 1$ 的解析 MPS 结构，需要 $O(n)$ 经典和量子资源用于 $n$-量子位寄存器，无需网格采样。我们在一维中展示了完整的单电子积分管道（重叠、动能和核吸引力），并使用零噪声外推法在 5 个量子位上验证了 IBM Heron 处理器上的重叠和动能，硬件引起的误差为 0.67%。在三维空间中，我们计算笛卡尔坐标中 1s 和 2s 轨道之间的多中心重叠积分，在 18~qubits 下离散化误差为 0.02\%。

系统的纠缠分析表明，笛卡尔坐标中三维 STO 的 MPS 键维数随着网格分辨率的增加而饱和——每个坐标 12 量子位的氢 1s 轨道达到 $\sim$138——建立了有界编码复杂性，而不是最初预期的指数缩放。 SVD 截断阈值提供了一个实用的资源参数，在阈值 $10^{-6}$ 下将键维数减少到 39，精度损失可以忽略不计。这些结果绘制了原子轨道振幅编码的纠缠图谱，并将基于 MPS 的状态准备建立为在量子计算机上实现精确 STO 基组的可行路径。

title: Genuine tripartite entanglement in Bhabha scattering with an entangled spectator particle
abstract: From the perspective of quantum information science, we investigate tree-level Bhabha scattering between an incident electron $A$ and a positron B, where $B$ is initially entangled with a spectator electron $C$, which does not participate in the scattering this http URL find that the quantum electrodynamics (QED) scattering between $A$ and $B$ can drive the global $ABC$ system into a genuine tripartite entangled (GTE) state. Using four canonical tripartite entanglement metrics, we systematically characterize and quantify the GTE of the composite system, and demonstrate that the scattering momentum of the $A$-$B$ pair and the initial $B$-$C$ entanglement are the key resources governing GTE this http URL further analyze the monogamy of quantum correlations, which imposes fundamental constraints on the shareability of quantum resources in multipartite systems. Specifically, we systematically study the monogamy relations for the squared entanglement of formation and squared quantum discord in our scattering model, and find that monogamy constraints are markedly relaxed in the non-relativistic regime, enabling enhanced shareability of quantum correlations across the three particles. This work uncovers novel quantum correlation properties of fundamental QED scattering processes, and provides direct theoretical guidance for the development of QED-based quantum information processing protocols.
summary:
从量子信息科学的角度，我们研究了入射电子$A$和正电子B之间的树级巴巴散射，其中$B$最初与不参与散射的旁观电子$C$纠缠。这个http URL发现$A$和$B$之间的量子电动力学（QED）散射可以驱动全局$ABC$系统进入真正的三方纠缠（GTE）状态。使用四个规范的三方纠缠度量，我们系统地表征和量化了复合系统的 GTE，并证明 $A$-$B$ 对的散射动量和初始 $B$-$C$ 纠缠是控制 GTE 的关键资源。此 http URL 进一步分析了量子相关性的一夫一妻制，这对多方系统中量子资源的共享性施加了基本约束。具体来说，我们系统地研究了散射模型中形成的平方纠缠和平方量子不和谐的一夫一妻制关系，发现一夫一妻制约束在非相对论体系中明显放松，从而增强了三个粒子之间量子相关性的共享性。

这项工作揭示了基本 QED 散射过程的新颖量子相关特性，并为基于 QED 的量子信息处理协议的开发提供了直接的理论指导。

title: A Multi-Level Integrity Evaluation Framework for Quantum Circuits under Controlled Anomaly Injection
abstract: Ensuring the integrity of quantum circuits is a significant challenge in the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, where circuits are subject to compilation transformations, hardware constraints, and potential adversarial modifications. Existing validation approaches typically rely on either structural analysis or behavioral evaluation, leading to incomplete assessment of circuit correctness. In this work, we investigate the relationship between structural, interaction-level, and behavioral perspectives of circuit integrity, demonstrating that a single aspect of integrity is insufficient to guarantee circuit integrity; structural similarity alone does not ensure behavioral equivalence. To address this problem, we use a three-layer metric framework that combines the Structural Integrity Score (SIS), the Operational Integrity Score (OIS), and the Interaction Graph Semantic-Logical Score (IGS). SIS captures global structural properties, OIS quantifies behavioral divergence using Jensen-Shannon distance, and IGS models interaction patterns and dependencies in a pre-execution setting. Through controlled anomaly injection on benchmark quantum circuits, we demonstrate that each metric captures a different aspect of circuit deviation. In particular, structural blind-spot cases (SIS >= 0.95) reveal a clear limitation of structural analysis, where OIS detects anomalies in 93.85% of instances, while IGS detects 72.58%. These results highlight that the metrics provide complementary insights and that a single metric is insufficient for reliable circuit validation.
summary:
确保量子电路的完整性是嘈杂中尺度量子（NISQ）时代的一项重大挑战，其中电路受到编译转换、硬件限制和潜在的对抗性修改的影响。现有的验证方法通常依赖于结构分析或行为评估，导致电路正确性的评估不完整。在这项工作中，我们研究了电路完整性的结构、交互级别和行为视角之间的关系，证明完整性的单一方面不足以保证电路完整性；仅结构相似性并不能确保行为等同。为了解决这个问题，我们使用了一个三层度量框架，该框架结合了结构完整性得分（SIS）、操作完整性得分（OIS）和交互图语义逻辑得分（IGS）。 SIS 捕获全局结构属性，OIS 使用 Jensen-Shannon 距离量化行为差异，IGS 对预执行设置中的交互模式和依赖关系进行建模。

通过对基准量子电路进行受控异常注入，我们证明每个指标都捕获了电路偏差的不同方面。特别是，结构盲点情况（SIS >= 0.95）揭示了结构分析的明显局限性，其中 OIS 在 93.85% 的实例中检测到异常，而 IGS 检测到 72.58%。这些结果强调，这些指标提供了互补的见解，并且单个指标不足以进行可靠的电路验证。

title: The Fock-Darwin-Darboux system: eigenstates, information entropies and dispersion-like measures
abstract: The Fock-Darwin (FD) quantum system describes the motion on the plane of a charged particle under the action of an isotropic oscillator potential together with a perpendicular constant magnetic field. When the isotropic oscillator is suppressed, the FD system leads to the Landau Hamiltonian with infinitely degenerate Landau levels. The Fock-Darwin-Darboux (FDD) system is the generalisation of the FD system to a particle moving on the Darboux III space, which is a conformally flat surface with non-constant negative curvature. We present a systematic study of some information-theoretic entropy and dispersion-like measures for these quantum systems. Since both systems are exactly solvable, analytical expressions for Shannon, Rényi and Tsallis entropies, among others, can be obtained. We show that for the FD system, its information-theoretic measures are formally the same as the ones for the harmonic oscillator, provided a modified effective frequency depending on the magnetic field is introduced. In the FDD case, the nonlinear nature of the underlying manifold precludes the existence of a simple closed form for the wave-function on momentum space, which is numerically analysed. We compare the numerical behaviour of the different entropy measures and we analyse the interplay arising in the FDD system between the curvature parameter and the magnetic field. In particular, it is shown that the Landau system on the Darboux III space has no infinitely degenerate Landau levels.
summary:
福克-达尔文 (FD) 量子系统描述了带电粒子在各向同性振荡器电势和垂直恒定磁场作用下在平面上的运动。当各向同性振子被抑制时，FD 系统导致朗道哈密顿量具有无限简并朗道能级。 Fock-Darwin-Darboux (FDD) 系统是 FD 系统对在 Darboux III 空间上运动的粒子的推广，该空间是具有非恒定负曲率的共形平坦表面。我们对这些量子系统的一些信息论熵和类似色散的度量进行了系统研究。由于这两个系统都是完全可解的，因此可以获得 Shannon、Rényi 和 Tsallis 熵等的解析表达式。我们表明，对于 FD 系统，其信息论测量在形式上与谐振子的信息论测量相同，只要引入取决于磁场的修改有效频率。在 FDD 情况下，基础流形的非线性性质排除了动量空间上波函数的简单封闭形式的存在，对此进行了数值分析。

我们比较了不同熵度量的数值行为，并分析了 FDD 系统中曲率参数和磁场之间的相互作用。特别是，表明达布 III 空间上的朗道系统不存在无限退化的朗道能级。

title: Multi-Objective Optimization by Quantum-Annealing-Inspired Algorithms
abstract: Combinatorial optimization is widely regarded as a primary application for near-term quantum processors, although a definitive demonstration of the practical quantum advantage remains elusive. Recent studies have reported that both gate-based quantum circuits and quantum annealers can outperform state-of-the-art classical heuristics on multi-objective optimization (MO-MaxCut) problems. However, these studies did not fully account for the substantial pre- and post-processing overheads intrinsic to quantum solvers, leading to incomplete comparisons between quantum and classical approaches. In this work, we re-examine the same benchmark suite using GPU-based quantum-annealing-inspired algorithms (QAIAs), which, analogously to quantum processors, generate probabilistic samples and thus serve as formidable classical contenders. Our results show that QAIAs can sample candidate solutions approximately two orders of magnitude faster than previously studied quantum processors. In terms of end-to-end runtime, QAIAs also surpass industry-leading classical solvers, thereby establishing themselves as the superior performers among the quantum and classical solvers evaluated thus far for the MO-MaxCut instances.
summary:
组合优化被广泛认为是近期量子处理器的主要应用，尽管实际量子优势的明确证明仍然难以捉摸。最近的研究表明，基于门的量子电路和量子退火器在多目标优化（MO-MaxCut）问题上的性能都优于最先进的经典启发式方法。然而，这些研究没有完全考虑量子求解器固有的大量预处理和后处理开销，导致量子方法和经典方法之间的比较不完整。在这项工作中，我们使用基于 GPU 的量子退火启发算法 (QAIA) 重新检查相同的基准测试套件，该算法类似于量子处理器，生成概率样本，从而成为强大的经典竞争者。我们的结果表明，QAIA 对候选解决方案的采样速度比之前研究的量子处理器快大约两个数量级。

在端到端运行时方面，QAIA 也超越了行业领先的经典求解器，从而使自己成为迄今为止针对 MO-MaxCut 实例评估的量子和经典求解器中的佼佼者。

title: Over forty years of research towards the understanding of Quantum Brownian Motion -- the contributions of A. O. Caldeira
abstract: This article presents a brief account of Amir O. Caldeira's contributions to the theory of quantum Brownian motion. Motivated by its importance, we outline the description of Brownian motion in the quantum regime following Caldeira's first works. In this context, we particularly highlight the effect of dissipation on the tunneling rate out of a metastable state. We then journey along the alternative ways to approach quantum Brownian motion developed by Caldeira during his career, which go beyond the so-called Caldeira-Leggett model. We conclude by summarizing some of Caldeira's contributions to contemporary fields such as the theory of quantum decoherence and quantum thermodynamics, that were strongly inspired by his eponymous approach to quantum Brownian motion.
summary: 本文简要介绍了阿米尔·卡尔代拉 (Amir O. Caldeira) 对量子布朗运动理论的贡献。受其重要性的启发，我们在卡尔代拉的第一个作品之后概述了量子领域中布朗运动的描述。在这种情况下，我们特别强调耗散对亚稳态隧道速率的影响。然后，我们沿着 Caldeira 在其职业生涯中开发的替代方法来研究量子布朗运动，这些方法超越了所谓的 Caldeira-Leggett 模型。最后，我们总结了卡尔代拉对量子退相干理论和量子热力学等当代领域的一些贡献，这些贡献受到了他对量子布朗运动的同名方法的强烈启发。

title: Neural and Tensor Networks in the Study of Quantum Annealing Processors
abstract: Quantum annealing targets low-energy solutions of Ising/QUBO problems, but reliable assessment requires more than best-energy comparisons. This dissertation develops a benchmarking framework for D-Wave quantum annealers that combines strong classical baselines, sampling and diversity metrics, and thermodynamic cost. Its first contribution, this http URL , is a topology-aware tensor-network heuristic for optimization and sampling on Pegasus/Zephyr-like graphs. It maps Ising instances to local Potts clusters, represents the partition function with PEPS, and performs branch-and-bound search in probability space. Benchmarks show that it is a physically interpretable reference solver, though approximate contractions limit its competitiveness on the largest instances. The second contribution treats quantum annealers as effective thermal machines, relating success probability and solution quality to dissipation, entropy production, and effective temperature. Carefully placed pauses can improve performance while reducing thermodynamic cost, although longitudinal fields may become harmful in paused schedules. The thesis also introduces reinforcement-learning post-processing to improve returned samples and exact small-system simulations to probe annealing dynamics. Overall, it argues for quantum-annealing benchmarks that jointly measure algorithmic performance and physical expenditure.
summary:
量子退火的目标是伊辛/QUBO问题的低能量解决方案，但可靠的评估需要的不仅仅是最佳能量比较。本论文开发了 D-Wave 量子退火器的基准测试框架，该框架结合了强大的经典基线、采样和多样性指标以及热力学成本。它的第一个贡献是这个 http URL ，是一种拓扑感知张量网络启发式算法，用于在类似 Pegasus/Zephyr 的图上进行优化和采样。它将 Ising 实例映射到本地 Potts 集群，用 PEPS 表示配分函数，并在概率空间中执行分支定界搜索。基准测试表明，它是一个物理上可解释的参考求解器，尽管近似收缩限制了它在最大实例上的竞争力。第二个贡献将量子退火器视为有效的热机器，将成功概率和解决方案质量与耗散、熵产生和有效温度联系起来。精心设置的暂停可以提高性能，同时降低热力学成本，尽管纵向场可能在暂停计划中变得有害。

该论文还介绍了强化学习后处理以改进返回的样本和精确的小系统模拟以探测退火动力学。总体而言，它主张联合衡量算法性能和物理支出的量子退火基准。

title: Reservoir-mediated spin entanglement in the mean-force Gibbs state
abstract: Two qubits strongly coupled to a common bosonic reservoir can become entangled with each other, despite having no direct interaction. In equilibrium, such coupling-induced coherences can be described by the mean-force Gibbs state. Here we derive approximate, analytic expressions for the two-qubit mean-force Gibbs state, and use these to characterize equilibrium qubit-qubit entanglement mediated by a thermal reservoir. Entanglement, which is highest at lowest temperatures, is a non-monotonic function of the system-reservoir coupling strength. Moreover, we find that broadening the reservoir spectral density beyond a single mode, as is realistic for typical baths, can enhance the qubit entanglement. Our results provide a comprehensive understanding of reservoir-mediated two-qubit entanglement in thermal equilibrium and provide a benchmark to compare with numerical methods, as well as demonstrating the utility of strong system-reservoir coupling as a resource.
summary: 尽管没有直接相互作用，但与公共玻色子库强耦合的两个量子位可能会彼此纠缠。在平衡状态下，这种耦合引起的相干性可以通过平均力吉布斯状态来描述。在这里，我们推导了两个量子位平均力吉布斯态的近似解析表达式，并使用这些表达式来表征由热库介导的平衡量子位-量子位纠缠。纠缠在最低温度下最高，是系统-储层耦合强度的非单调函数。此外，我们发现将储层谱密度拓宽到单一模式之外（对于典型的浴来说是现实的）可以增强量子位纠缠。我们的结果提供了对热平衡中储层介导的两个量子位纠缠的全面理解，并提供了与数值方法进行比较的基准，并证明了强系统-储层耦合作为资源的效用。

title: All pure entangled states can lead to fully nonlocal correlations
abstract: It is a well-established fact that some quantum correlations can be nonlocal, meaning that they cannot be described by a local hidden variable model. Certain quantum correlations have a form of nonlocality so strong that they cannot be reproduced even by models having an arbitrarily small local hidden variable component. These correlations are called fully nonlocal and lead to Bell inequalities in which the maximum quantum value saturates the non-signaling bound. A well-known example of this effect, which is also referred to as quantum pseudo-telepathy or all-versus-nothing proofs of nonlocality, is the quantum distribution fulfilling the Peres-Mermin square, in which the underlying state is a $4\times4$ dimensional maximally entangled state. Other examples of full nonlocality are known but, so far, all of them are for maximally entangled states and it is an open question whether maximal entanglement is necessary for full nonlocality. In this work, we first establish a link between full nonlocality and the concept of antidistinguishability of quantum states. We use this connection to show that in every bipartite $d\times d$ Hilbert space, with $d\geq3$, there are non-maximally entangled states that are fully nonlocal. In fact, we derive simple sufficient conditions for full nonlocality that are only based on the smallest and largest Schmidt coefficients. We also show that in every dimension there exist pure entangled states that do not exhibit full nonlocality. Finally, we show that all pure entangled states can be activated to show full nonlocality in the many-copy scenario.
summary:
众所周知的事实是，一些量子相关性可能是非局部的，这意味着它们不能用局部隐变量模型来描述。某些量子相关性具有很强的非定域性，即使具有任意小的局部隐变量分量的模型也无法再现它们。这些相关性被称为完全非局部相关性，并导致贝尔不等式，其中最大量子值使非信号界限饱和。这种效应的一个众所周知的例子，也被称为量子伪心灵感应或非定域性的全无证明，是满足 Peres-Mermin 平方的量子分布，其中基础状态是 $4\times4$ 维最大纠缠态。完全非定域性的其他例子是已知的，但到目前为止，所有这些都是最大纠缠态，并且最大纠缠对于完全非定域性是否必要是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们首先在完全非定域性和量子态的反可区分性概念之间建立联系。

我们使用此连接来表明，在每个二分 $d\times d$ 希尔伯特空间中，具有 $d\geq3$，存在完全非局域的非最大纠缠态。事实上，我们仅基于最小和最大施密特系数导出完全非定域性的简单充分条件。我们还表明，在每个维度中都存在不表现出完全非定域性的纯纠缠态。最后，我们证明所有纯纠缠态都可以被激活，以在多副本场景中显示完全的非局域性。

title: Probabilistic Condition, Decision and Path Coverage of Circuit-based Quantum Programs
abstract: Coverage criteria play a central role in assessing test adequacy in classical software, yet their effectiveness for quantum programs remains poorly understood and largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose six quantum-tailored criteria - condition, decision, and path coverage, and their probabilistic variants - adapted from their classical counterparts. We present QaCoCo, a tool that computes these criteria for circuit-based quantum programs. We empirically evaluate these criteria on a large and diverse set of 540 circuits and analyze the coverage achieved. Our results show that while circuits frequently achieve high condition and decision coverage (97.56% and 97.63%, on average), path coverage remains limited (71.84%), particularly in the presence of multi-controlled gates, which induce extreme path explosion and coverage imbalance. Moreover, to account for the probabilistic nature of quantum circuits, we introduce probabilistic coverage, which augments structural coverage with a confidence measure (88.87%, 88.65%, and 37.18% for condition, decision, and path coverage, respectively, on average). Finally, through mutation testing, we find weak or no correlation between fault detection and structural coverage, consistent with observations in classical computing.
summary:
覆盖率标准在评估经典软件的测试充分性方面发挥着核心作用，但它们对量子程序的有效性仍然知之甚少，并且很大程度上未经探索。在本文中，我们提出了六个量子定制标准——条件、决策和路径覆盖及其概率变体——改编自经典标准。我们推出了 QaCoCo，这是一种计算基于电路的量子程序的这些标准的工具。我们在大量不同的 540 个电路上根据经验评估这些标准，并分析所实现的覆盖范围。我们的结果表明，虽然电路经常实现较高的条件覆盖率和决策覆盖率（平均为 97.56% 和 97.63%），但路径覆盖率仍然有限（71.84%），特别是在存在多控制门的情况下，这会导致极端的路径爆炸和覆盖率不平衡。此外，为了解释量子电路的概率性质，我们引入了概率覆盖，它通过置信度度量增强了结构覆盖（条件覆盖、决策覆盖和路径覆盖平均分别为 88.87%、88.65% 和 37.18%）。

最后，通过变异测试，我们发现故障检测和结构覆盖之间的相关性很弱或没有，这与经典计算中的观察结果一致。

title: Tikhonov-regularised projected gradient flow for equality-constrained bilinear quantum control
abstract: We study a projection-type gradient flow for equality-constrained maximisation of a smooth bilinear control objective on $\mathcal{H}=L^2(0,T;\mathbb{R})$, eliminating Lagrange multipliers through an $(M{+}1)\times(M{+}1)$ moving Gram matrix $\Gamma(s)_{\ell\ell'}=\int_0^T S(t)\,c_\ell(s,t)\,c_{\ell'}(s,t)\,\mathrm{d}t$. The flow generates monotonic ascent in continuous time but becomes unstable on discretisation; existing implementations rely on heuristic step-size safeguards lacking rigorous justification. We close this gap by replacing $\Gamma$ with $\Gamma_{\varepsilon}:=\Gamma+\varepsilon^{2}I$ and prove: (i) an exact spectral identity giving $\kappa(\Gamma_{\varepsilon})=(\sigma_{\max}^{2}+\varepsilon^{2})/(\sigma_{\min}^{2}+\varepsilon^{2})$; (ii) objective monotonicity $\mathrm{d}J/\mathrm{d}s\ge 0$ for all $\varepsilon\ge 0$; (iii) constraint drift $|h_{m}-C_{m}|=\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{2})$ with a computable prefactor; (iv) convergence of the regularised trajectory to the unregularised one in $L^{2}(0,T)$ at rate $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{2})$ under uniform invertibility of $\Gamma$; and (v) a discrete CFL criterion $\Delta s\,G\,\|\Gamma_{\varepsilon}^{-1}\|\le\alpha<2$ guaranteeing objective monotonicity of the forward-Euler scheme up to $\mathcal{O}(\Delta s^{2})$ local truncation error. The theory is validated on a three-level bilinear benchmark for all-optical Bell-state preparation, where $\kappa(\Gamma)\in[10^{9},10^{11}]$, the predicted $\varepsilon^{2}$ rate is confirmed over eight decades, and moderate regularisation eliminates step rejections and reduces constraint drift by more than an order of magnitude at unchanged final fidelity.
summary:
我们研究了在 $\mathcal{H}=L^2(0,T;\mathbb{R})$ 上平滑双线性控制目标的等式约束最大化的投影型梯度流，通过 $(M{+}1)\times(M{+}1)$ 移动 Gram 矩阵 $\Gamma(s)_{\ell\ell'}=\int_0^T 消除拉格朗日乘数S(t)\,c_\ell(s,t)\,c_{\ell'}(s,t)\,\mathrm{d}t$。流动在连续时间内产生单调上升，但在离散化时变得不稳定；现有的实施依赖于启发式的步长保障措施，缺乏严格的理由。

我们通过用 $\Gamma_{\varepsilon}:=\Gamma+\varepsilon^{2}I$ 替换 $\Gamma$ 来缩小这一差距，并证明： (i) 给出精确的光谱恒等式$\kappa(\Gamma_{\varepsilon})=(\sigma_{\max}^{2}+\varepsilon^{2})/(\sigma_{\min}^{2}+\varepsilon^{2})$; (ii) 客观单调性 $\mathrm{d}J/\mathrm{d}s\ge 0$ 对于所有 $\varepsilon\ge 0$； (iii) 带有可计算前置因子的约束漂移 $|h_{m}-C_{m}|=\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{2})$； (iv) 在 $\Gamma$ 一致可逆性下，$L^{2}(0,T)$ 中正则化轨迹以 $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{2})$ 速率收敛到非正则化轨迹； (v) 离散 CFL 准则 $\Delta s\,G\,\|\Gamma_{\varepsilon}^{-1}\|\le\alpha<2$ 保证前向欧拉方案的客观单调性达到 $\mathcal{O}(\Delta s^{2})$ 局部截断误差。该理论在全光学贝尔态准备的三级双线性基准上得到验证，其中$\kappa(\Gamma)\in[10^{9},10^{11}]$，预测的$\varepsilon^{2}$速率在八个十年内得到确认，适度的正则化消除了阶跃拒绝，并在最终保真度不变的情况下将约束漂移减少了一个数量级以上。

title: Emergence of $π$ from Equatorial Quantum Localization
abstract: We present a genuinely non-radial quantum-mechanical route by which $\pi$ emerges from equatorial localization on the sphere. For the highest-weight branch of spherical harmonics, this localization is captured by a natural geometric rigidity index, whose exact finite-quantum-number value is a Wallis partial product. The mechanism is realized in two settings: the standard rigid rotor and the surface sector of a thin spherical shell, where radial freezing reduces the dynamics to the same angular problem. In the large-quantum-number limit, the probability cloud collapses toward the equator, the rigidity index approaches its classical value, and the Wallis formula is recovered through the correspondence principle. The result shows that Wallis-type structures in quantum mechanics can arise as exact signatures of semiclassical localization encoded by a simple geometric observable.
summary: 我们提出了一条真正的非径向量子力学路径，$\pi$ 通过该路径从球体的赤道局域化中出现。对于球谐函数的最高权重分支，这种定位是通过自然几何刚度指数捕获的，其精确的有限量子数值是沃利斯部分积。该机构通过两种设置实现：标准刚性转子和薄球壳的表面部分，其中径向冻结将动力学降低到相同的角度问题。在大量子数极限下，概率云向赤道塌缩，刚性指数接近经典值，通过对应原理恢复了沃利斯公式。结果表明，量子力学中的沃利斯型结构可以作为由简单几何可观测量编码的半经典局域化的精确签名而出现。

title: The temperature dependent geometric phase
abstract: There exists a geometric phase for a quantum state during the adiabatic evolution of the system. If the adiabatic procedure happens between the system and the environment interacting with it similar to Born-Oppenheimer (BO) approximation, we can introduce a temperature into the environment, which can be regarded as in an equilibrium state. Then a temperature-dependent geometric phase can be obtained for the system, which originates from the Abelian gauge potential induced by the BO approximation. This gauge potential contributes to the effective potential of the system, which is temperature dependent, too. Finally, we demonstrate them using an example of H_2^+ ion system.
summary: 在系统绝热演化过程中，存在量子态的几何相。如果系统和与其相互作用的环境之间发生类似于玻恩-奥本海默（BO）近似的绝热过程，我们可以向环境中引入一个温度，该温度可以被视为处于平衡状态。然后可以获得系统的依赖于温度的几何相位，该几何相位源自由 BO 近似引起的阿贝尔规范势。该表压电势有助于系统的有效电势，而系统的有效电势也与温度有关。最后，我们使用 H_2^+ 离子系统的示例来演示它们。

title: Least constraint approach to non-relativistic quantum mechanics
abstract: We formulate a variational principle for non-relativistic quantum mechanics inspired by Gauss's principle of least constraint. We define a quantum constraint functional as the probability-weighted square deviation between the actual motion and the unconstrained motion that would arise from external forces alone. In this functional, the quantum potential plays the role of an intrinsic constraint that modifies the acceleration. Minimizing this quantum constraint functional with respect to the acceleration field yields the quantum Euler equations, which together with the continuity equation are equivalent to the Schrödinger equation. The principle is instantaneous and provides a differential characterization of quantum evolution. We demonstrate that this formulation is not a mere rewriting of existing dynamics: it provides a unified and technically economical treatment of geometric constraints and velocity-dependent dissipative forces, neither of which admits a straightforward global variational formulation. Potential applications to a broad range of quantum phenomena are also indicated.
summary: 受高斯最小约束原理的启发，我们制定了非相对论量子力学的变分原理。我们将量子约束函数定义为实际运动与仅由外力引起的无约束运动之间的概率加权平方偏差。在这个函数中，量子势起着改变加速度的内在约束的作用。最小化相对于加速场的量子约束函数会产生量子欧拉方程，该方程与连续性方程一起等效于薛定谔方程。该原理是瞬时的，并提供了量子演化的微分表征。我们证明，这个公式不仅仅是对现有动力学的重写：它提供了对几何约束和速度相关耗散力的统一且技术上经济的处理，而这两者都不允许直接的全局变分公式。还指出了其在广泛量子现象中的潜在应用。

title: Fault-Tolerant Resource Comparison of Qudit and Qubit Encodings for Diagonal Quadratic Operators
abstract: Finite local Hilbert-space truncations arise naturally in quantum simulations of lattice field theories and motivate qudit encodings, but their fault-tolerant advantage over qubit encodings remains unclear. We compare the non-Clifford cost of implementing quadratic diagonal evolutions, exemplified by $U=e^{-it\phi_x^2}$ in a uniform field-amplitude discretization of a real scalar field, using either one logical $d$-level qudit or $n_b=\lceil \log_2 d\rceil$ logical qubits. We analyze two standard settings: product-formula simulation and LCU/block encoding, taking the resource metric to be the number of non-Clifford gates after synthesis into a discrete logical gate set. Because tight synthesis bounds for general single-qudit rotations are not known, we express the qudit constructions in terms of embedded two-level $SU(2)$ rotations and derive explicit finite-$d$ break-even conditions for their synthesis cost; these serve as compiler targets for when qudit encodings can outperform the qubit baseline. Within the constructive models studied here, product-formula implementations would require an exponentially stronger per-primitive synthesis advantage for qudits to win asymptotically, while in the LCU setting the qubit encoding is asymptotically cheaper in $d$. Nevertheless, the finite-$d$ threshold analysis identifies low dimensional regions in which qudits can yield meaningful constant-factor savings, particularly for LCU-based implementations. As a secondary analysis of the LCU construction, we use an idealized negligible-overhead qubit-qudit code-switching model to give an absolute $T$-count comparison, and reinterpret the savings as an allowable per-switch overhead budget.
summary:
有限局部希尔伯特空间截断在晶格场论的量子模拟中自然出现并激发了量子编码，但它们相对于量子位编码的容错优势仍不清楚。我们比较了实现二次对角演化的非克利福德成本，以实标量场的均匀场幅离散化中的 $U=e^{-it\phi_x^2}$ 为例，使用一个逻辑 $d$ 级 qudit 或 $n_b=\lceil \log_2 d\rceil$ 逻辑量子位。我们分析了两种标准设置：乘积公式模拟和 LCU/块编码，将资源度量视为综合为离散逻辑门集后的非 Clifford 门的数量。由于一般单 qudit 旋转的严格综合界限是未知的，因此我们用嵌入的两级 $SU(2)$ 旋转来表达 qudit 结构，并为其综合成本导出显式的有限-$d$ 收支平衡条件；当 qudit 编码能够超越 qubit 基线时，这些将作为编译器目标。

在此处研究的构造性模型中，乘积公式实现需要指数级更强的每基元合成优势，才能使 qudits 渐近获胜，而在 LCU 设置中，量子位编码的成本在 $d$ 中渐近便宜。尽管如此，有限 $d$ 阈值分析识别了低维区域，其中 qudits 可以产生有意义的常数因子节省，特别是对于基于 LCU 的实现。作为 LCU 结构的二次分析，我们使用理想化的可忽略开销 qubit-qudit 代码转换模型来给出绝对的 $T$ 计数比较，并将节省的成本重新解释为允许的每次切换开销预算。

title: Quantum Feature Selection with Higher-Order Binary Optimization on Trapped-Ion Hardware
abstract: We present a quantum feature-selection framework based on a higher-order unconstrained binary optimization (HUBO) formulation that explicitly incorporates multivariate dependencies beyond standard quadratic encodings. In contrast to QUBO-based approaches, the proposed model includes one-, two-, and three-body interaction terms derived from mutual-information measures, enabling the objective function to capture feature relevance, pairwise redundancy, and higher-order statistical structure within a unified energy model. To suppress trivial all-selected solutions, we further include structured linear penalties that promote sparsity while preserving informative variables. The resulting HUBO instances are optimized with digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization on IonQ Forte and compared against noiseless quantum simulation as well as two classical dimensionality-reduction baselines: SelectKBest based on mutual information and principal component analysis (PCA). We evaluate the proposed workflow on two benchmark classification datasets, namely the Gallstone dataset and the Spambase dataset, and analyze both predictive performance and selected-subset structure. The results show good qualitative agreement between hardware executions and noiseless simulations, supporting the feasibility of implementing higher-order feature-selection Hamiltonians on current trapped-ion processors. In addition, the quantum approach yields competitive classification performance while producing compact and informative feature subsets, highlighting the potential of higher-order quantum optimization for machine-learning preprocessing tasks.
summary:
我们提出了一种基于高阶无约束二进制优化（HUBO）公式的量子特征选择框架，该公式明确地结合了标准二次编码之外的多元依赖性。与基于 QUBO 的方法相比，所提出的模型包括从互信息测量导出的一体、二体和三体相互作用项，使目标函数能够在统一的能量模型中捕获特征相关性、成对冗余和高阶统计结构。为了抑制琐碎的全选解决方案，我们进一步包括结构化线性惩罚，以促进稀疏性，同时保留信息变量。生成的 HUBO 实例在 IonQ Forte 上通过数字化反非线性量子优化进行优化，并与无噪声量子模拟以及两个经典降维基线进行比较：基于互信息和主成分分析 (PCA) 的 SelectKBest。我们在两个基准分类数据集（即 Gallstone 数据集和 Spambase 数据集）上评估所提出的工作流程，并分析预测性能和选定子集结构。

结果显示硬件执行和无噪声仿真之间具有良好的定性一致性，支持在当前捕获离子处理器上实现高阶特征选择哈密顿量的可行性。此外，量子方法产生有竞争力的分类性能，同时产生紧凑且信息丰富的特征子集，凸显了高阶量子优化在机器学习预处理任务中的潜力。

title: Protein folding on a 64 qubit trapped-ion hardware via counterdiabatic quantum optimization
abstract: We report the largest trapped-ion hardware demonstration of lattice protein-folding optimization to date, using bias-field digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization (BF-DCQO) on a fully connected 64-qubit Barium development system similar to the forthcoming IonQ Tempo line. Six peptide sequences with 14-16 amino-acid residues are encoded using a coarse-grained tetrahedral lattice model, yielding higher-order spin-glass Hamiltonians with long-range interactions involving up to five-body terms and mapped to 46-61 qubits. The resulting instances are demanding for near-term quantum hardware because low-energy configurations must satisfy backbone-geometry constraints while optimizing dense residue-contact interactions. BF-DCQO uses a non-variational bias-feedback mechanism, where low-energy samples from each round define longitudinal fields that guide subsequent quantum evolutions. Across the studied instances, BF-DCQO shifts raw sampled energy distributions toward lower energies than uniform random sampling, with the strongest improvements appearing in residue-contact variables. To preserve this signal, we introduce a consensus-based post-processing pipeline that combines quantum-learned contact information with feasible backbone geometries. The resulting hybrid workflow reaches the classical reference energy in multiple instances and improves over the corresponding random-seeded pipeline. These results show that BF-DCQO can generate structured samples for dense protein-folding Hamiltonians at previously unexplored trapped-ion scales.
summary:
我们报告了迄今为止最大的晶格蛋白质折叠优化的俘获离子硬件演示，在类似于即将推出的 IonQ Tempo 系列的完全连接的 64 量子位 Barium 开发系统上使用偏置场数字化反绝热量子优化 (BF-DCQO)。使用粗粒度四面体晶格模型编码具有 14-16 个氨基酸残基的 6 个肽序列，产生具有涉及多达五体项的长程相互作用的高阶自旋玻璃哈密顿量，并映射到 46-61 个量子位。由此产生的实例对近期量子硬件提出了很高的要求，因为低能量配置必须满足主干几何约束，同时优化密集的残基接触相互作用。 BF-DCQO 使用非变分偏差反馈机制，其中每轮的低能量样本定义指导后续量子演化的纵向场。在所研究的实例中，BF-DCQO 将原始采样能量分布转变为比均匀随机采样更低的能量，其中最强的改进出现在残留物接触变量中。

为了保留该信号，我们引入了基于共识的后处理管道，它将量子学习的接触信息与可行的骨干几何结构相结合。由此产生的混合工作流程在多个实例中达到经典参考能量，并改进了相应的随机种子管道。这些结果表明 BF-DCQO 可以在以前未探索的捕获离子尺度上生成密集蛋白质折叠哈密顿量的结构化样本。

title: A Gaussian asymmetry measure
abstract: The study of Entanglement Asymmetry has emerged in recent years as a powerful tool to characterise the symmetry properties of quantum states in relation to a given charge operator through the lens of entanglement. While extremely powerful and general, the standard definition of asymmetry introduces significant non-Gaussian features in free-fermionic systems, leading to certain analytical limitations. In this work, we introduce an asymmetry measure that remains strictly within the Gaussian manifold and analyse its properties. In particular, we show that it quantifies the minimal distance between a Gaussian state and the manifold of symmetric Gaussian states. We further demonstrate that this measure captures the established dynamical signatures of entanglement asymmetry, such as the Mpemba effect, symmetry restoration, and the lack thereof. The Gaussian structure allows these novel asymmetry measures to be computed exactly using correlation matrix techniques, and to be described asymptotically through the quasiparticle picture. We also comment on the possibility of using charge fluctuations to characterise the asymmetry of a Gaussian state.
summary: 近年来，纠缠不对称性的研究已成为一种强大的工具，可以通过纠缠透镜来表征与给定电荷算子相关的量子态的对称性。虽然非常强大和通用，但不对称性的标准定义在自由费米子系统中引入了显着的非高斯特征，导致了某些分析限制。在这项工作中，我们引入了严格保留在高斯流形内的不对称度量并分析了其属性。特别是，我们证明它量化了高斯状态和对称高斯状态流形之间的最小距离。我们进一步证明，该方法捕获了已建立的纠缠不对称动力学特征，例如 Mpemba 效应、对称性恢复及其缺乏。高斯结构允许使用相关矩阵技术精确计算这些新颖的不对称测量，并通过准粒子图渐近地描述。我们还评论了使用电荷涨落来表征高斯态不对称性的可能性。

title: Strict Hierarchy for Quantum Channel Certification to Unitary
abstract: We consider the problem of quantum channel certification to unitary, where one is given access to an unknown $d$-dimensional channel $\mathcal{E}$, and wants to test whether $\mathcal{E}$ is equal to a target unitary channel or is $\varepsilon$-far from it in the diamond norm. We present optimal quantum algorithms for this problem, settling the query complexities in three access models with increasing power. Specifically, we show that: (i) $\Theta(d/\varepsilon^2)$ queries suffice for incoherent access model, matching the lower bound due to Fawzi, Flammarion, Garivier, and Oufkir (COLT 2023). (ii) $\Theta(d/\varepsilon)$ queries suffice for coherent access model, matching the lower bound due to Regev and Schiff (ICALP 2008). (iii) $\Theta(\sqrt{d}/\varepsilon)$ queries suffice for source-code access model, matching the lower bound due to Jeon and Oh (npj Quantum Inf. 2026). This demonstrates a strict hierarchy of complexities for quantum channel certification to unitary across various access models.
summary: 我们考虑单一量子通道认证问题，其中一个人被授予访问未知$d$维通道$\mathcal{E}$的权限，并想要测试$\mathcal{E}$是否等于目标单一通道或者$\varepsilon$-在钻石范数中与它相距甚远。我们针对这个问题提出了最佳量子算法，以越来越强大的能力解决了三种访问模型中的查询复杂性。具体来说，我们表明：(i) $\Theta(d/\varepsilon^2)$ 查询足以满足不连贯的访问模型，匹配 Fawzi、Flammarion、Garivier 和 Oufkir (COLT 2023) 的下限。 (ii) $\Theta(d/\varepsilon)$ 查询足以实现一致访问模型，匹配 Regev 和 Schiff 的下限（ICALP 2008）。 (iii) $\Theta(\sqrt{d}/\varepsilon)$ 查询足以满足源代码访问模型，匹配 Jeon 和 Oh 的下限 (npj Quantum Inf. 2026)。这展示了量子通道认证在各种接入模型中的严格复杂性层次结构。

title: En Route to a Standard QMA1 vs. QCMA Oracle Separation
abstract: We study the power of quantum witnesses under perfect completeness. We construct a classical oracle relative to which a language lies in $\mathsf{QMA}_1$ but not in $\mathsf{QCMA}$ when the $\mathsf{QCMA}$ verifier is only allowed polynomially many adaptive rounds and exponentially many parallel queries per round. Additionally, we derandomize the permutation-oracle separation of Fefferman and Kimmel, obtaining an in-place oracle separation between $\mathsf{QMA}_1$ and $\mathsf{QCMA}$. Furthermore, we focus on $\mathsf{QCMA}$ and $\mathsf{QMA}$ with an exponentially small gap, where we show a separation assuming the gap is fixed, but not when it may be arbitrarily small. Finally, we derive consequences for approximate ground-state preparation from sparse Hamiltonian oracle access, including a bounded-adaptivity frustration-free variant.
summary: 我们研究完美完整性下量子见证人的力量。当 $\mathsf{QCMA}$ 验证器仅允许多项式自适应轮次和每轮指数级数量的并行查询时，我们构建了一个经典预言机，相对于该语言，语言位于 $\mathsf{QMA}_1$ 中，但不在 $\mathsf{QCMA}$ 中。此外，我们对 Fefferman 和 Kimmel 的排列预言分离进行去随机化，获得 $\mathsf{QMA}_1$ 和 $\mathsf{QCMA}$ 之间的就地预言分离。此外，我们关注具有指数级小间隙的 $\mathsf{QCMA}$ 和 $\mathsf{QMA}$，其中我们在假设间隙固定的情况下显示分离，但当间隙可能任意小时则不显示。最后，我们从稀疏的哈密顿预言访问中得出近似基态准备的结果，包括有界自适应无挫败变体。

title: The most discriminable quantum states in the multicopy regime
abstract: This work investigates which sets of quantum states give rise to the highest achievable success probability in minimum-error state discrimination if multiple copies of the unknown state are given. Specifically, we consider uniformly distributed ensembles of the form $\left\{\frac{1}{N},\rho_i^{\otimes k}\right\}_{i=1}^N$, where $N$ states in dimension $d$ are provided in $k$ identical copies, and derive universal limits in this scenario. For pure state ensembles, we prove that whenever $N$ is large enough to support a state $k$-design, these designs will exactly give rise to the maximally discriminable sets. We further show that when $N$ exceeds the size required for a $k$-design, mixed states can outperform all pure state ensembles. We also analyse the analogue classical discrimination problems, in which states are replaced by probability distributions. We recognise that the problem of most discriminable classical states in the multi-copy regime is in one-to-one correspondence to the concept of the multiplicative Bayes capacity of independent uses of classical channels, a concept that emerges naturally in the context of classical information leakage. This connection allows us to completely solve the classical analogue of our problem when $N\geq \binom{d + k - 1}{k}$, and to prove that quantum systems offer a quadratic advantage (in number of copies $k$) over classical ones. Curiously, we also show that this quantum advantage is strongly reduced when one is restricted to real quantum states. Finally, we introduce computational techniques to find sets of most discriminable ensembles, and to obtain rigorous universal upper bounds on the maximal success probability for multi-copy state discrimination in cases that are analytically intractable.
summary:
这项工作研究了如果给定未知状态的多个副本，哪些量子态集在最小错误状态辨别中可实现最高的成功概率。具体来说，我们考虑 $\left\{\frac{1}{N},\rho_i^{\otimes k}\right\}_{i=1}^N$ 形式的均匀分布系综，其中维度 $d$ 中的 $N$ 状态以 $k$ 个相同副本提供，并在这种情况下导出通用极限。对于纯状态集成，我们证明只要 $N$ 足够大以支持状态 $k$ 设计，这些设计将准确地产生最大可辨别集。我们进一步表明，当 $N$ 超过 $k$ 设计所需的大小时，混合状态可以优于所有纯状态集成。我们还分析了模拟经典判别问题，其中状态被概率分布取代。我们认识到，多副本机制中最可辨别的经典状态的问题与独立使用经典通道的乘法贝叶斯能力的概念一一对应，这是一个在经典信息泄漏的背景下自然出现的概念。

这种联系使我们能够完全解决 $N\geq \binom{d + k - 1}{k}$ 问题的经典模拟，并证明量子系统比经典系统具有二次优势（以副本数 $k$ 计）。奇怪的是，我们还表明，当一个人被限制在真实的量子态时，这种量子优势会大大降低。最后，我们引入计算技术来找到最具可辨别性的集合，并在分析上难以处理的情况下获得多副本状态辨别的最大成功概率的严格通用上限。

title: Simulating dynamics of RLC circuits with a quantum differential-algebraic equations solver
abstract: We introduce a quantum algorithm for simulating the dynamics of electrical circuits consisting of resistors, inductors and capacitors (aka RLC circuits) along with power sources. Given oracle access to the connectivity of the circuit and values of the electrical elements, our algorithm prepares a quantum state that encodes voltages and current values either at a specified time or the history of their evolution over a time-interval. For an RLC circuit with $N$ components, our algorithm runs in time $\textsf{polylog}(N)$ under mild assumptions on the connectivity of the circuit and values of its components. This provides an exponential speed-up over classical algorithms that take $\textsf{poly}(N)$ time in the worst-case. Our algorithm can be used to estimate energy across a set of components or dissipated power in $\textsf{polylog}(N)$ time, a problem that we prove is BQP-hard and therefore unlikely to be efficiently solved by classical algorithms. The main challenge in simulating the dynamics of RLC circuits is that they are governed by differential-algebraic equations (DAEs), a coupled system of differential equations with hidden algebraic constraints. Consequentially, existing quantum algorithms for ordinary differential equations cannot be directly utilized. We therefore develop a quantum DAE solver for simulating the time-evolution of linear DAEs. For RLC circuits, we employ modified nodal analysis to create a system of DAEs compatible with our quantum algorithm. We establish BQP-hardness by demonstrating that any network of classical harmonic oscillators, for which an energy-estimation problem is known to be BQP-hard, is a special case of an LC circuit. Our work gives theoretical evidence of quantum advantage in simulating RLC circuits and we expect that our quantum DAE solver will find broader use in the simulation of dynamical systems.
summary:
我们引入了一种量子算法，用于模拟由电阻器、电感器和电容器（又名 RLC 电路）以及电源组成的电路的动态。如果预言机可以访问电路的连接性和电气元件的值，我们的算法会准备一个量子状态，该状态可以对指定时间的电压和电流值或其在一段时间内的演变历史进行编码。对于具有 $N$ 组件的 RLC 电路，我们的算法在电路连通性及其组件值的温和假设下及时运行 $\textsf{polylog}(N)$。与在最坏情况下需要 $\textsf{poly}(N)$ 时间的经典算法相比，这提供了指数级的加速。我们的算法可用于估计 $\textsf{polylog}(N)$ 时间内一组组件的能量或耗散功率，我们证明这个问题是 BQP 困难的，因此不太可能通过经典算法有效解决。模拟 RLC 电路动态的主要挑战是它们受微分代数方程 (DAE) 控制，微分代数方程是一个具有隐藏代数约束的微分方程耦合系统。

因此，现有的常微分方程量子算法不能直接利用。因此，我们开发了一种量子 DAE 求解器来模拟线性 DAE 的时间演化。对于 RLC 电路，我们采用改进的节点分析来创建与我们的量子算法兼容的 DAE 系统。我们通过证明任何经典谐振子网络（其能量估计问题已知为 BQP 困难）是 LC 电路的特例来建立 BQP 困难。我们的工作提供了模拟 RLC 电路中量子优势的理论证据，我们预计我们的量子 DAE 求解器将在动态系统的模拟中得到更广泛的应用。
